summary: W909 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W908's bundled W715 target-surjective-compact provider with the target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain compactness provider fields. This preserves the W899-W908 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and still routes through W908 into the stable ExactAt construction. Product success remains false because the route fields are not yet instantiated and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W909 exposes W715 target data as two fields, but the remaining W909 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W909 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W909 fields are the right-open closed-quotient-cover boundary, the source-difference cokernel pi-zero boundary, relation-pullback data, target-relation-lift data, target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-map diagram component fields, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, W722 source-triangulation data, W856 endpoint topology facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-three W909 closed-map target-fields relation-fields boundary-fields component-fields source-triangulation endpoint-facts explicit field inputs.

Choose whether the next smallest contract-closing increment should expose strict preimage object/map fields, fixed-target uniqueness, source-image normalization, or another currently supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
